ai_summary: Here's the executive summary:  Housing and Urban Development Corporation Limited (HUDCO) has committed to provide up to Rs. 1,00,000 Crore in term loans over five years to the Government of Bihar for urban infrastructure and Greenfield Satellite Cities. This massive undertaking will significantly expand HUDCO's loan book and exposure while offering transformative development funding for Bihar. However, the immense scale, extended repayment period (up to 25 years), and reliance on future project revenues or state budget guarantees for repayment, particularly for complex new city developments, introduce substantial credit risk for HUDCO.
